commands.review_summary:
The branch makes trajectory support metadata skip malformed skill snapshot entries, tolerates nullish support-redaction paths, adds regression coverage, and records the fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the current main failure path, and the source PR supplies redacted live before/after gateway logs for the symlink-escape scenario; I did not run a local repro because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; review found no blocking code findings and the existing automerge path should rely on exact-head CI gates.
